channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Cycle hangar full of litter and not maintained, 20th March
item.description:
Cycle hangar (2034) outside Fellows Court, Weymouth Terrace is full of litter and debris. Not cleaned for a long time. Difficult and unhygienic to use. Please arrange urgent cleaning.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Weymouth Terrace, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: At junction, 20th March
item.description:
Uneven road surface with potholes

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Greville Road, Maida Vale, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: At junction, 20th March
item.description:
Uneven road surface with potholes

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Greville Road, Maida Vale, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: New delayed cricket pitch is awful., 20th March
item.description:
Hi there this one's probably for the council, but whichever genius contracting firm installed this, needs to come back and fix it it's uneven and unsightly. Whoever signed this off needs to come back and take a long good look at it. I hope there's a service agreement but I think the whole thing needs reinstalling.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Glenesk Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Excessive litter by bus stop J, 20th March
item.description:
So much litter in the bushy area behind bus stop J - running from the lights all the way to the roundabout that links to Trowbridge Road and chapman Road. Hundreds of bottles and plastic rubbish and fly tipped rubbish. Been there for months.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): East Cross Route, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Traffic lights stay on green for 2 seconds, 20th March
item.description:
This issue has been reported previously. The traffic lights allow only one or two vehicles through on green when approaching from Bostall Hill towards Woolwich Road, which is causing significant congestion on that side. In contrast, the lights for Knee Hill remain green for much longer, allowing multiple vehicles to pass. The current phasing appears unbalanced and is contributing to unnecessary delays and queuing. This needs to be reviewed and adjusted ASAP. There have been multiple complaints so why has nothing been done about it?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brampton Road, Abbey Wood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Truck drove into post, 20th March
item.description:
Post bent towards pavement and causing obstruction

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Glynde Road, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: There are a number of potholes in the road leading to the roundabout situated near doctors surgery, 20th March
item.description:
The potholes have been there for three months
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): King Harolds Way, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A toilet has been dumped on the street, 20th March
item.description:
A fly tipped toilet is on the street
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Maple Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Three black backs left on pavement outside house, 20th March
item.description:
These three bags full of rubbish were dumped outside our house a few days ago, 17 Machel Road, SE15 3XQ. We think they are full of garden waste. Please can they be removed? Thank you!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Machell Road, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: One purple sack of litter, 20th March
item.description:
One purple sack of litter collected by a street friend opposite 53 new street hill

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): New Street Hill, Sundridge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unacceptable noise & disturbance, 20th March
item.description:
Please, please can some one do something about the behaviour of some of the residents at this address (5 Oaklands Road). It has numerous residents & I’m sure some are good neighbours but sadly some are not. The noise & aggressive behaviour by some is not acceptable. This week the noise level caused by aggressive shouting has been intolerable. Today’s shouting (at the top of someone’s voice) of f**k your wife on repeat is an example of what we’ve had the pleasure of listening to. I do not know who I should report this to, so am starting here. Please advise on how to get this anti social behaviour dealt with please. Thank you.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Oaklands Road, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple potholes, 20th March
item.description:
Multiple potholes in excess of 1.5 meters, which have been there for a few months now, and keep getting larger

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Station Road, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bags of rubbish on corner of road, 20th March
item.description:
These bags have been dumped for a few weeks now & refuse collection has not collected (assuming because no previous report has been made) these bags contain the same type of gas canisters as previously dumped. Please could you delegate a team to collect asap. Much appreciated

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Meridian Road, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter bin by Waitrose burnt down - unusable, 20th March
item.description:
A litter bin by the zebra crossing outside Waitrose on Sidcup High Street has been burnt down - all the plastic has melted and it is unusable. It needs to be removed asap. Thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, High Street, Albany Park, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The junction of Marcella Road with Fir Grove Foad, 20th March
item.description:
The vehicle a blue Vauxhall Astra has had it number plates removed it has been there and not moved for one month
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Fir Grove Road, Loughborough Junction, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside no. 8 Camden Studios, 20th March
item.description:
Low hanging tree opposite my front door. Branches are touching my property. Communal area/tree. Tree is currently held up my bricks. Thanks.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Camden Street, St Pancras, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:
Fly tipping

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ashfield Parade, Southgate

item.description:
Wardrobe doors dumped on grass verge in two areas

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Birch Row, Southborough, Greater London

item.description:
